description:
Simplify the extension architecture where logic is currently over-engineered around ad hoc parsing.

Scope:
- identify flows that should mostly inject prompts / user messages and let the model call tools
- keep non-LLM responsibilities focused on disk/process/worktree/runtime actions
- reduce bespoke parsing where the extension is guessing intent or structure from text
- make the slash-command layer and tool layer the stable API surface for both humans and LLMs
title: Reduce parser-heavy flows and favor prompt/tool-driven agentic execution
